comment: Allowed query parameters per route. Routes not listed here have query strings stripped.
comment_statements: Statement list sorting, filtering, and pagination
comment_statements_count: Statement count chip refresh — view param selects incomplete vs completed tab
comment_statement_detail: Statement detail view controls, export, and pagination
comment_oauth: Xero OAuth callback — success (code, scope, state, session_state) and error paths
comment_manage_subscription: Portal return triggers a delayed refresh to pick up webhook updates
